_notes: Additional pet portraits for marquee variety. Same look as the main species set so they sit together.
style_suffix: studio-style soft natural window light, head-and-shoulders portrait composition, sharp focus on the eyes, gentle calm expression, fur or skin texture clearly detailed, pale sky-blue and cream backdrop with smooth gradient, no text or props or accessories, clean composition that reads at thumbnail size, warm documentary tone, never stock-glossy, 35mm prime lens look, subtle film grain

images.prompt: A small fluffy golden retriever puppy held in two cupped hands, head visible, soft trusting eyes, pink nose, downy fur, clean pale sky-blue gradient background, gentle warm natural light
A small orange tabby kitten sitting upright, head and shoulders, big curious blue-green eyes, soft fluffy fur, gentle expression, clean pale sky-blue gradient background, soft warm natural light

A pet cockatiel parrot perched, head turned three-quarter to camera, signature yellow head crest and orange cheek patches, gray body feathers, clean pale sky-blue gradient background, soft warm natural light
A small Syrian hamster sitting upright, head and shoulders portrait, holding paws together, dark beady eyes, soft golden fur, clean pale sky-blue gradient background, soft warm natural light

A pet green iguana in profile, head and front shoulder visible, vivid green-and-orange scales, calm posture on a neutral light wood perch, clean pale sky-blue gradient background, soft warm natural light, lizard skin texture detailed
A backyard pet chicken (silkie or buff orpington breed) head and chest portrait, soft fluffy feathers, alert eye, gentle expression, clean pale sky-blue gradient background, soft warm natural light
